full_text:
Xianyu Yin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xianyu Yinwas born in Possibly Yuyang. Aided Xianyu Fu’s loyalist revolt against Gongsun Zan. Xianyu Yin was affiliated with Liu Yu.
